description: You are a robotics hobbyist designing a custom motor mount adapter. Create a 3D part in SolveSpace consisting of a 60mm × 60mm square base plate, 10mm thick, centered on the origin. On the top face of this base plate, create a centered cylindrical boss with a 30mm diameter and a height of 50mm protruding upward. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/square_flange_shaft.slvs.
